seoTitle: How to File a Tax Extension on TurboTax (2026)
metaDescription: Need more time to file? Here's how to submit a tax extension electronically through TurboTax before the deadline hits.
intro: Not everyone has their paperwork together by the filing deadline, and that's exactly what a tax extension is for. This guide covers how to file an extension electronically in TurboTax, so freelancers, small business owners, and anyone short on time can buy themselves more room without the process becoming its own headache.

steps.heading: Know why you might need an extension
steps.body: An extension gives you extra time to submit your paperwork when you're missing documents or juggling other priorities, without the pressure of the original filing deadline.

steps.heading: Access the extension filing tools in TurboTax
steps.body: Open TurboTax and navigate to the section designed for filing a tax extension rather than a full return.

steps.heading: Navigate to the extension filing section
steps.body: TurboTax guides you through the specific screens for extension filing, separate from the standard return flow.

steps.heading: Complete your extension form
steps.body: Fill in the required information for your extension request, using TurboTax's guided prompts to reduce the chance of errors.

steps.heading: Submit electronically and confirm
steps.body: File your extension electronically through TurboTax and confirm it went through, giving you documented proof you requested more time.

faq.question: Does filing an extension in TurboTax cost extra?
faq.answer: The video doesn't specify pricing, so check your TurboTax product tier for details on whether extension filing is included.

faq.question: Does an extension give me more time to pay taxes owed?
faq.answer: An extension generally gives you more time to file your paperwork, not necessarily more time to pay any taxes owed, so review your specific situation carefully.

faq.question: Can freelancers and small business owners file extensions through TurboTax?
faq.answer: Yes, TurboTax's extension filing tools are built to accommodate individuals, freelancers, and small business owners who need extra time.

faq.question: What happens after I submit my extension?
faq.answer: TurboTax provides confirmation once your extension is filed electronically, giving you a record that you requested the additional time.
